productDisplayName: Nike Men's Dual Fusion Black Shoe
description: With plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike Dual Fusion ST running shoe is perfect for runners who have a neutral to slightly overpronated gait. Lighweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who walk a lot.Upper Soft, single-layer mesh for breathable comfort Perforated, internal fit saddle work with lacing system for comfortable and snug fit Strategically placed overlays offer lightweight support to the midfoot region Internal heel counter works with external heel overlays to supply snug stability Gilly lacing system promotes a supportive, locked-in fit EVA sockliner offers plush comfort and performance Midsole Dual-density Phylon midsole has a softer foam in the center with firmer foam on the perimeter for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced support Moulded siping on the firmer density foam is designed to act as a crash pad for smoother transition from heelstrike Outsole Solid rubber waffle outsole delivers cushioning and optimal traction on varied surfaces Forefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motion Wash careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
